message:
fix(wasm): cap Vec pre-allocation in extract_bytes to prevent OOM on large arrays

The extract_bytes() function used Vec::with_capacity(arr.len()) which
trusted the reported array length from the JS runtime. A malicious or
buggy extension returning an array with a very large .len() would
cause a massive allocation before any elements are read. Cap the
pre-allocation at 1 MB to bound memory usage while still avoiding
excessive reallocation for normal-sized payloads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
